Flash Flood on Highway 14 at Redrock Randsburg Rd. Search and Rescue was called out. Motorist was able to escape vehicle and flood. Within the hour, multiple vehicles became either stuck in muddy water or surrounded by heavy currents in the Randsburg and Garlock areas. The vehicles included two patrol cars, an ambulance, and a fire truck. All the occupants were able to drive their vehicles to safety once the flooding subsided.
